default_question: Checkout API is returning HTTP 500 and paging on-call. Find the root cause, propose a fix, and draft a proactive incident update.

timeline.detail: deploy_id dep_20260227_0906 rolled out to 100% traffic in us-east-1.
HTTP 500 rate crossed 15% in checkout confirm endpoint.
PagerDuty incident INC-5142 created for payments-platform.

log_excerpt: 2026-02-27T09:11:58.441Z ERROR checkout-api req_id=bc2ff1 status=500 path=/v1/checkout/confirm NullPointerException: cannot read property currency_code of None
2026-02-27T09:11:58.447Z ERROR checkout-api req_id=bc2ff1 trace=2fd7 serializer.checkout_response line=214
2026-02-27T09:12:02.881Z ERROR checkout-api req_id=81a91a status=500 path=/v1/checkout/confirm NullPointerException: cannot read property currency_code of None
2026-02-27T09:12:07.229Z ERROR checkout-api req_id=53de40 status=500 path=/v1/checkout/confirm NullPointerException: cannot read property currency_code of None
2026-02-27T09:12:13.056Z INFO checkout-api req_id=d13f91 fallback=legacy_serializer skipped because compact_serializer is mandatory

trace_evidence.observation: Null dereference when optional billing currency metadata is missing.
compact_serializer enabled for 100% traffic; no gradual rollout.
DB latency normal; no saturation detected.

infra_events.detail: No regional AWS outage reported in us-east-1 during incident window.
Edge network latency stable; no global incident.

analysis.primary_cause: Deploy dep_20260227_0906 introduced a null dereference in compact checkout serializer when currency metadata is absent.
contributing_factors: Feature flag enabled at 100% without canary.

proposed_pr.title: Guard optional currency metadata in compact serializer and restore safe fallback
diff_summary: Add null-safe handling when billing currency metadata is missing.
Re-enable legacy serializer fallback when compact serializer throws.
Add regression tests for missing currency metadata path.
validation_steps: Replay failing payload fixtures from logs.

proactive_message_template: Incident update: checkout-api 500 spike traced to deploy dep_20260227_0906 (serializer null dereference). Mitigation in progress: fallback restored and hotfix PR prepared. Customer impact: elevated checkout failures in us-east-1 since 09:12 UTC.
